snapshot.config/tickets/general.json:
{
  "_CONFIG_VERSION": "limey-tickets-v1.0.0",
  "mainColor": "#5865F2",
  "serverId": "",
  "globalAdmins": [],
  "logs": {
    "enabled": false,
    "channel": "",
    "logMessages": {
      "creation": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "closing": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "deleting": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "reopening": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "claiming": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "pinning": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "adding": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "removing": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "renaming": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "moving": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "blacklisting": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "transferring": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "topicChange": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "priorityChange": { "dm": false, "logs": true },
      "reactionRole": { "dm": false, "logs": true }
    }
  },
  "ticketSystem": {
    "useRedErrorEmbeds": true,
    "emojiStyle": "before",
    "pinEmoji": "📌",
    "closeEmoji": "🔒",
    "replyOnTicketCreation": true,
    "askPriorityOnTicketCreation": true,
    "removeParticipantsOnClose": false,
    "pinFirstTicketMessage": true,
    "limits": {
      "enabled": true,
      "globalMaximum": 50,
      "userMaximum": 3
    },
    "channelTopic": {
      "showOptionName": true,
      "showOptionDescription": false,
      "showOptionTopic": true,
      "showPriority": false,
      "showClosed": true,
      "showClaimed": false,
      "showPinned": false,
      "showCreator": false,
      "showParticipants": false
    },
    "closedCategory": {
      "enabled": false,
      "categoryId": ""
    },
    "backupCategory": {
      "enabled": false,
      "categoryId": ""
    }
  },
  "permissions": {
    "help": "everyone",
    "panel": "admin",
    "close": "everyone",
    "delete": "admin",
    "reopen": "everyone",
    "claim": "admin",
    "unclaim": "admin",
    "pin": "admin",
    "unpin": "admin",
    "move": "admin",
    "rename": "admin",
    "add": "admin",
    "remove": "admin",
    "blacklist": "admin",
    "stats": "everyone",
    "clear": "admin",
    "autoclose": "admin",
    "autodelete": "admin",
    "transfer": "admin",
    "topic": "admin",
    "priority": "admin",
    "transcripts": "admin"
  }
}
